{{< include "resources/people_slide.qmd" >}}

```{=html}
<!-- Full-slide container; all icon positions are % of slide dimensions -->
<div style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;">

  <!-- ── Overlay icons: Reveal.js fragment (fade-in) ── -->
  <div class="fragment fade-in" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:66.461%;top:10.554%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:63.094%;top:69.167%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.246%;top:10.259%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:32.502%;top:14.465%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.213%;top:73.512%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:32.522%;top:81.693%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:59.705%;top:65.087%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:46.293%;top:22.98%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:42.804%;top:90.076%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:36.157%;top:23.051%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.805%;top:60.622%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.641%;top:73.454%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:90.388%;top:52.536%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:32.748%;top:23.068%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:39.496%;top:10.59%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:56.268%;top:85.801%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:66.723%;top:27.261%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:49.659%;top:90.306%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.48%;top:44.151%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:52.999%;top:69.27%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:36.094%;top:27.325%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.424%;top:52.577%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.82%;top:6.353%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:39.38%;top:81.707%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:46.077%;top:81.636%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:15.434%;top:52.464%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.503%;top:81.615%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.6%;top:90.061%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.536%;top:48.378%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:87.176%;top:31.257%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:63.284%;top:64.979%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:42.641%;top:77.734%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:15.542%;top:6.012%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.851%;top:1.922%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.252%;top:85.899%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:25.66%;top:69.368%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.879%;top:6.295%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.939%;top:39.925%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:36.194%;top:10.26%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:39.591%;top:69.375%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.224%;top:81.907%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.332%;top:39.665%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.804%;top:48.016%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:18.974%;top:27.349%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.229%;top:69.268%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.44%;top:90.22%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:59.982%;top:1.849%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.422%;top:2.114%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:86.819%;top:52.556%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:69.97%;top:69.328%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.229%;top:64.896%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.348%;top:2.002%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:56.519%;top:2.096%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.367%;top:18.903%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:46.137%;top:85.836%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:90.296%;top:39.963%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:1.981%;top:85.92%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:25.642%;top:48.106%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:42.601%;top:27.197%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:56.289%;top:31.367%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:25.828%;top:73.48%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.806%;top:52.447%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.943%;top:73.598%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.414%;top:22.86%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.49%;top:52.433%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:80.252%;top:73.358%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:90.258%;top:77.411%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.287%;top:60.76%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:32.562%;top:1.939%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:39.207%;top:73.384%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.514%;top:73.559%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:49.425%;top:18.711%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:18.904%;top:43.968%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.626%;top:23.147%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:90.552%;top:18.606%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:29.157%;top:77.603%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.96%;top:60.912%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.258%;top:6.113%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:43.0%;top:65.036%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:18.901%;top:35.517%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:32.434%;top:18.937%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:90.586%;top:14.487%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:2.072%;top:77.571%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:15.504%;top:14.677%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.41%;top:6.35%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:46.199%;top:69.088%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.634%;top:14.665%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.87%;top:56.422%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.535%;top:85.847%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:86.899%;top:10.561%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:39.557%;top:64.88%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:59.983%;top:90.382%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.783%;top:31.272%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:18.942%;top:52.383%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:2.019%;top:69.025%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:25.636%;top:77.423%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:63.227%;top:90.149%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.986%;top:77.601%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:53.073%;top:90.079%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:25.607%;top:31.333%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:1.93%;top:1.86%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:25.626%;top:39.994%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:29.221%;top:14.771%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.445%;top:27.202%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:56.402%;top:6.082%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:42.714%;top:81.974%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.966%;top:90.066%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.565%;top:22.977%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.146%;top:18.649%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:15.789%;top:73.358%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:59.602%;top:73.502%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.209%;top:73.385%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:15.661%;top:48.32%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.288%;top:90.381%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:80.359%;top:14.51%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:56.35%;top:81.733%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.536%;top:56.455%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:66.631%;top:14.531%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:69.806%;top:81.821%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:63.243%;top:22.931%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:18.858%;top:2.131%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.697%;top:1.819%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.797%;top:86.183%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:66.695%;top:1.88%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:63.313%;top:31.232%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.711%;top:14.566%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.211%;top:48.059%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.532%;top:56.473%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.211%;top:56.791%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:80.201%;top:23.168%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:42.693%;top:18.959%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.661%;top:39.609%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:86.893%;top:77.416%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:2.031%;top:39.759%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:63.266%;top:81.648%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:87.085%;top:90.106%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.632%;top:1.98%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:87.098%;top:64.986%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:39.259%;top:31.302%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:2.118%;top:90.28%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:46.301%;top:27.258%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:36.023%;top:65.051%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.529%;top:64.914%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:25.806%;top:14.536%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:15.479%;top:35.482%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.728%;top:60.77%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:2.056%;top:64.949%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.454%;top:65.175%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:35.856%;top:31.41%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.744%;top:18.954%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:63.248%;top:73.47%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.853%;top:48.115%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.261%;top:22.996%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:1.858%;top:52.247%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.249%;top:60.777%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.405%;top:31.477%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:80.046%;top:52.412%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:66.499%;top:6.098%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:69.925%;top:10.281%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.298%;top:2.03%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:90.231%;top:73.564%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.401%;top:43.942%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.009%;top:44.18%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:59.694%;top:85.99%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.104%;top:64.947%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.941%;top:81.847%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.651%;top:39.772%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.55%;top:35.525%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:63.128%;top:27.145%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.49%;top:73.559%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.836%;top:35.505%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:90.515%;top:6.209%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.101%;top:14.539%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:46.096%;top:90.103%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.643%;top:31.282%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:15.471%;top:65.116%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:46.252%;top:10.565%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:32.48%;top:65.002%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:56.588%;top:10.325%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:90.422%;top:1.974%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:1.923%;top:56.726%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:46.149%;top:2.182%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.625%;top:90.14%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:66.603%;top:22.893%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.602%;top:39.768%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:59.62%;top:18.789%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.391%;top:39.977%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.299%;top:10.311%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.327%;top:90.296%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:66.638%;top:73.448%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:80.144%;top:86.106%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.77%;top:10.464%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:52.845%;top:27.028%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.341%;top:86.122%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.432%;top:43.982%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:70.056%;top:86.164%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:49.787%;top:22.85%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:53.058%;top:14.522%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.637%;top:43.977%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.728%;top:6.101%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:19.033%;top:56.762%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:19.09%;top:86.023%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.492%;top:10.315%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.789%;top:35.443%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:56.274%;top:69.374%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.877%;top:2.054%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.64%;top:52.239%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.893%;top:56.711%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:25.665%;top:10.373%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:49.551%;top:14.535%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:1.872%;top:60.833%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.244%;top:14.596%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:59.959%;top:31.212%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:42.71%;top:73.219%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.577%;top:27.39%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:36.119%;top:77.699%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.802%;top:64.951%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:52.983%;top:2.021%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:66.558%;top:18.997%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:1.823%;top:14.603%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:19.009%;top:69.007%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.636%;top:56.482%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:52.891%;top:81.614%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:69.825%;top:18.641%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:39.23%;top:1.906%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:46.363%;top:73.599%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:87.078%;top:86.138%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:59.967%;top:77.654%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.757%;top:69.16%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:42.7%;top:85.906%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:35.818%;top:18.934%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:49.745%;top:31.286%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:80.015%;top:35.473%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.605%;top:31.558%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:15.764%;top:56.713%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.553%;top:86.187%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.522%;top:18.987%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.928%;top:10.546%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.325%;top:81.994%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.443%;top:48.143%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.645%;top:35.414%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:15.561%;top:77.779%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:76.98%;top:69.054%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:29.027%;top:6.345%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:53.01%;top:31.433%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:18.896%;top:39.835%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.034%;top:31.241%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:63.336%;top:85.918%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:53.067%;top:77.77%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.459%;top:60.997%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:63.321%;top:14.695%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:1.85%;top:31.289%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.393%;top:31.221%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:29.033%;top:2.142%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:42.78%;top:31.321%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.34%;top:23.197%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:49.789%;top:73.299%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.506%;top:31.429%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:29.283%;top:90.254%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:56.466%;top:77.551%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.217%;top:52.211%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.356%;top:90.349%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:90.428%;top:64.923%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:39.398%;top:14.553%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:83.525%;top:18.601%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:19.001%;top:65.013%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:29.02%;top:31.281%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.854%;top:44.13%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:39.392%;top:18.873%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:15.488%;top:31.291%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:32.634%;top:86.012%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:29.328%;top:69.173%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.425%;top:18.904%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.279%;top:22.851%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:29.211%;top:22.895%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:69.962%;top:73.553%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:8.736%;top:85.821%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:52.893%;top:10.568%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:80.067%;top:48.314%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.262%;top:77.686%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:86.924%;top:48.12%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:80.083%;top:27.105%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:73.407%;top:64.953%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:59.986%;top:6.083%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.137%;top:35.506%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:19.011%;top:23.173%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:86.803%;top:60.938%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:36.064%;top:85.826%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:49.73%;top:69.342%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:5.224%;top:56.681%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.041%;top:1.945%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:12.132%;top:77.489%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:90.466%;top:48.392%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:86.89%;top:73.242%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:32.517%;top:31.384%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:19.188%;top:18.86%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:93.966%;top:27.378%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:22.509%;top:14.603%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/woman_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:29.107%;top:18.652%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  <img src="icons/man_green.svg" style="position:absolute;left:56.318%;top:23.181%;width:5.0%;filter:drop-shadow(1px 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.22));">
  </div>

</div>
```
